message.content:
@startuml skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0 skinparam class { BackgroundColor #F5F5F5 BorderColor Black ArrowColor Black } skinparam stereotypeCBackgroundColor #C8E6C9 skinparam stereotypeCBorderColor Black class "PropertyValueList" as PVList { + lookupLabel + propertyValuePair } class "NumericalProperty" as NumProp class "StringProperty" as StrProp PVList --> NumProp : propertyValuePair PVList --> StrProp : propertyValuePair note right of PVList Class PropertyValueList
Attributes: - lookupLabel - propertyValuePair end note note right of NumProp Class NumericalProperty end note note right of StrProp Class StringProperty end note @enduml
